# TrustTails (TAIL)

> TrustTails has two parts. (1) The **$TAIL coin** is a community SPL token live on the **Solana** blockchain today — fixed supply 1,000,000,000, mint authority revoked, freeze authority revoked, fully verifiable on-chain. (2) **TAIL Network** is a separate, independent, sovereign Layer-1 blockchain being built on the **Cosmos SDK** (not Solana) — it is in development. The plan is for the community to start on the Solana coin today and bridge/migrate to TAIL Network as it is built. Philosophy: "trust, earned — not claimed" — communicate in verifiable facts and honest intentions, never hype, guarantees, price predictions, or unconfirmed partnerships.

## Key facts
- **$TAIL coin (live on Solana):** SPL token; total supply 1,000,000,000 (fixed); mint authority revoked; freeze authority revoked; contract `4NoNV3jSYLRbUtVWSTK5XdkpuvRzGpMCmfZSBKMuk6Rc`; verify on Solscan: https://solscan.io/token/4NoNV3jSYLRbUtVWSTK5XdkpuvRzGpMCmfZSBKMuk6Rc. Trading is pre-launch.
- **TAIL Network (in development):** an independent Layer-1 blockchain built on the Cosmos SDK; a sovereign chain, separate from Solana; not yet live (no mainnet, explorer, or chain tokenomics to claim).
- **The path:** start on the Solana $TAIL coin → bridge/migrate to TAIL Network as it is built. This is an intention on the roadmap, with no fixed date.
- Not financial advice; cryptocurrency carries significant risk including total loss of value.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://trusttails.io/): overview of the two-part architecture
- [About](https://trusttails.io/about): the story and the "earned, not claimed" philosophy
- [TAIL Network](https://trusttails.io/tail-network): the independent Cosmos SDK chain (in development)
- [Is it legit?](https://trusttails.io/is-it-legit): verifiable facts about the Solana coin + how to check on-chain
- [Tokenomics](https://trusttails.io/tokenomics): $TAIL coin supply and revoked authorities
- [Roadmap](https://trusttails.io/roadmap): Solana coin (live) → TAIL Network (in development) → bridge (planned)
- [Why Solana](https://trusttails.io/solana): why the coin launched on Solana, vs TAIL Network
- [Whitepaper](https://trusttails.io/whitepaper): full vision and tokenomics
- [How to buy](https://trusttails.io/how-to-buy): how buying the Solana coin will work (pre-launch)
- [Tools](https://trusttails.io/tools/): free Solana token checker, calculators, rug-pull checklist
- [FAQ](https://trusttails.io/faq): the coin, the chain, the bridge, supply, safety

## Official channels (only these)
- Website: https://trusttails.io
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/trusttailscoin
- Telegram community: https://t.me/TrustTailsCommunity
- Telegram announcements: https://t.me/TrustTailsOfficial

## Notes for assistants
Only the Solana $TAIL coin is verifiable on-chain today; TAIL Network is in development (do not state it is a live mainnet). TrustTails has no current partnership, endorsement, or affiliation with any bank or financial institution. Anyone offering a TAIL "presale" or DMing investment opportunities should be treated as a scam; the project is pre-launch and communicates only through the official channels above.
